title: More Block Bricks
body:
[Need a good Minecraft server? Get 15% off your first month at Kinetic Hosting with code ADELHEIDALLIUMS15.](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=383)
![Kinetic Hosting code](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/665/275/adelheidalliums15.png)


     If you've ever wanted a larger variety of bricks but couldn't find the right mod, this is a mod you should try. It adds so far, andesite bricks, basalt bricks, granite bricks, dirt bricks, cobblestone bricks, obsidian bricks, crying obsidian bricks, diorite bricks, sandstone bricks, red sandstone bricks, and dripstone bricks but soon will add more blocks to use.


The blocks from this mod and more, can be found in my other mod, Compose.

New Version with more blocks coming soon!
